titleStmt.title: SII 40.294: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 294. (A.R. No. B. 339 of 1933.) Tāḷḷūru, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a Garuḍa-pillar lying before the temple of Vēṇugōpālasvāmi.
This is dated Śaka 1368 (danti-ras-ānal-ēṁdu), Kshaya, Paushya, śu. 11, Wednesday, Makara-Saṅkrānti, corresponding to 1446 A.D., December 29.

Records the renewal of the tax-free gift of lands, previously gifted to the temples of Gōpīnātha, Hanumān and Sīta at Tāḷḷūru and grant of lands to Vedic scholars (Śrōtriya) made in the same year by the king, for the merit of his father.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śākēdaṁtirasānalēṁdu gaṇi
tē varṣē kṣayākhyē śubhē . pauṣemāsi hari
rdine makarasaṁkrāṁtyāca vakṣēsite . vā
rē caṁdrasutasya cannanṛ patērgōvi
ṁdasūnōssadāsdi ddaṁ harisa
nnidhau pitṛgaṇaissārddhaṁ mahādhārmmi
kaḥ . śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśaḥ mīsa
ragaṁḍakaṭhāri sāḷuvāṁkitaḥ . kēsava
yyamahārājustāḷāṁ kṣētramu
ttamaṁ gopināthahanmutaprita
ye pūrvamāgataṁ . Akarotsarrvamā
nyaṁ ca samasta keśavarjātaṁ kṣaya saṁ
tsara puṣya śu 5 gu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍa
lēśvara kaṭhāri sāḷuvakasuvayyadēvamahārā
julu tāḷūri śrī gōpinātha dēvaraku pūrvāna ce
lli cēnu kha 3 hanumaṁttadēvaraku cēnu kha 1 sītammana dēva
sthānālaku Iccina dharmmaśāsanaṁ Idevaḷku
śrotriyakaṭla Akesanayyadēva mahārāju
laku puṇyamugānu makarasaṁkrāṁtti puṇyakālamaṁ
ṁdu dhāravośi Ācaṁdrārkkamugānu Aṣṭabhōgatē
jasvāmyaṁbugānu yistimigāna sukha Ābāla A
nubhaviṁcupeṭṭiṁdi yī dharmmānaku yavvaru dappi
nānu gaṁga gōvu jappina pāpānaṁ
bōvuvāru śrī
Digital edition of SII 40.294 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
